title: Fridge Door Drinks Jug - Assorted Colours Sent At Random
features: Designed to fit nearly all fridge doors. Made of high-quality durable plastic
Ideal for storing juice, milk, water or other liquid items
Easy to use and easy to clean. Dishwasher safe
Available in 4 assorted colour lids. Purple, Pink, Blue, Green. Colour send randomly.
